title: Order No. 2 of 2012 on Overspill Radio Frequency Interference
summary: Requires Mena Telecom and Zain to cease overspill radio frequency interference into Saudi Arabia.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.licensing: Order to cease overspill radio frequency interference.
